name: Marine
description: Steel wire rope sourcing for marine procurement contexts where material, coating and corrosion requirements must be confirmed.

name: Crane and Lifting
description: Selection framework for lifting-related inquiries. Final suitability must be verified against application requirements and standards.

name: Architectural
description: Wire rope procurement for architectural projects where finish, diameter, fittings and documentation need confirmation.

name: Security Cables
description: Wire rope and coated cable sourcing for security cable assemblies and custom lengths.

name: Control Cables
description: Selection support for control cable sourcing where construction, flexibility and terminals are specified by drawings.

name: Fitness Equipment
description: Wire rope procurement framework for equipment manufacturers using drawings and verified product requirements.

name: Industrial Assemblies
description: Custom wire rope assemblies for industrial procurement, packaging and repeat purchasing workflows.
